title: Add Color Paint show, Kid Grove land, Dead Eyes merch booth, Paint & Death food booth, and Obsession Scream haunted house

requirements.summary: Add Color Paint kid-friendly show with 5 characters (Celeste the unicorn, Cosmo the dog, and 3 additional characters) scheduled for 2028, displayed in Shows section with future show badge
acceptanceCriteria: Color Paint show appears in shows.ts content with name, description highlighting 5 characters, and appropriate metadata
Show card displays in Shows section with 2028 badge
Characters Celeste the unicorn and Cosmo the dog are prominently featured in the description
3 additional kid-friendly characters are created and included in the show description

file_operations.description: Add Color Paint show to the shows array with name 'Color Paint', description featuring Celeste the unicorn, Cosmo the dog, and 3 additional kid-friendly characters, hauntSeasonOnly set to false, and a year field set to 2028 to indicate future show status
Update ShowsSection to display a '2028' or 'Coming 2028' badge for shows with a future year field, ensuring the Color Paint show is visually distinguished as an upcoming attraction

requirements.summary: Add Kid Grove themed land coming in 2050 with 500,000 square feet, indicating Color Paint show will be located there, displayed as upcoming expansion
acceptanceCriteria: Kid Grove land is added to appropriate content structure with 500,000 sq ft specification
Land information indicates 2050 opening date
Color Paint show description references Kid Grove as its location
Kid Grove announcement is visible in an appropriate section (upcoming features or expansions)

file_operations.description: Create new content file exporting themedLands array containing Kid Grove land with id, name 'Kid Grove', description highlighting kid-friendly theme, openingYear 2050, sizeSqFt 500000, status 'planned', and futureShows array referencing Color Paint. Follow the ThemedLand interface from backend.d.ts
Update Color Paint show description to reference Kid Grove as its future location, stating 'This show will be featured in the upcoming Kid Grove land opening in 2050'

Create section component that displays planned themed lands from themedLands.ts filtered by status 'planned', showing Kid Grove with opening year, size, and associated shows in a card layout with appropriate future expansion styling
Import and add UpcomingExpansionsSection component to the home route after the ShowsSection to display Kid Grove and other future land announcements

requirements.summary: Add Dead Eyes merchandise booth selling shoes, clothes, autographs, and additional items, displayed in Merch Shops section
acceptanceCriteria: Dead Eyes merch booth is added to merchShops.ts with name, items list including shoes, clothes, autographs, and additional merchandise
Booth appears in the Merch Shops section grid
Description reflects horror theme while showcasing the merchandise variety

file_operations.description: Add Dead Eyes merch shop to the shops array with name 'Dead Eyes', items array including 'Horror-themed shoes', 'Exclusive clothing line', 'Character autographs', 'Collectible posters', 'Limited edition accessories', and additional horror merchandise items, with appropriate pricing (e.g., '$25-$75')
Add 'dead-eyes-merch' entry to merchShops category mapping to 'frontend/public/assets/generated/dead-eyes-merch.dim_800x600.png' to reference the AI-generated booth image

requirements.summary: Add Paint & Death split-concept food booth with paint-themed menu on one side and death-themed menu on the other, with creative horror-appropriate food names and descriptions
acceptanceCriteria: Food booth is added to foodBooths.ts with name indicating split concept
Menu includes distinct paint-themed items on one side with creative names and descriptions
Menu includes distinct death-themed items on the other side with horror-appropriate names and descriptions
Booth description explains the split concept clearly
Booth appears in Food Booths section with appropriate styling
Detail page shows complete menu for both sides

file_operations.description: Add Paint & Death booth to foodBooths array with name 'Paint & Death', tagline highlighting the split concept (e.g., 'A Split Experience: Colorful Chaos Meets Dark Delights'), description explaining one side serves vibrant paint-themed cuisine while the other offers macabre death-themed items, and menu array containing paint-themed items (e.g., 'Splatter Burger - Colorful beef patty with rainbow sauces', 'Brushstroke Fries - Multi-colored seasoned fries', 'Canvas Shake - Swirled fruit smoothie') and death-themed items (e.g., 'Reaper's Ribs - Blackened BBQ ribs', 'Tombstone Pizza - Charcoal crust specialty pizza', 'Coffin Cake - Dark chocolate dessert')
Add 'paint-death-booth' entry to foodBooths category mapping to 'frontend/public/assets/generated/paint-death-booth.dim_1000x700.png' to reference the AI-generated split booth design image

Create detail page component for Paint & Death booth following the pattern of existing food booth pages (e.g., CandyCaneCarnagePage.tsx), displaying booth image from generatedImages, description emphasizing the split concept, and two distinct menu sections labeled 'Paint Side Menu' and 'Death Side Menu' with all items from foodBooths.ts
Add route for Paint & Death booth detail page at path '/food-booth/paint-death' following the pattern of other food booth routes
Ensure Paint & Death booth card navigation uses slugified name 'paint-death' to route to the detail page at '/food-booth/paint-death'

requirements.summary: Add Obsession Scream haunted house featuring Leslie character (terrifying teen with long purple hair) with detailed descriptions emphasizing psychological horror and obsession themes
acceptanceCriteria: Obsession Scream haunted house is added to hauntedHouses.ts with name, tagline, and detailed description
Leslie character is prominently featured in the house description as a terrifying teen with long purple hair
House description emphasizes psychological horror and obsession themes
Haunted house appears in the Haunted Houses section grid
Detail page includes extreme horror warning and guest rules navigation
Leslie's character description highlights her threatening nature and distinctive appearance

file_operations.description: Add Obsession Scream to hauntedHouses array with name 'Obsession Scream', tagline emphasizing psychological horror (e.g., 'When Obsession Turns Deadly'), detailed description featuring Leslie as the main antagonist described as a terrifying teen with long purple hair who stalks victims through twisted corridors of her obsessive shrine, subScenes array including scenes like 'Leslie's Lair', 'Hall of Obsession', 'The Shrine Room', and location field

Add 'obsession-scream' entry to hauntedHouses category mapping to 'frontend/public/assets/generated/leslie-obsession-scream.dim_800x1000.png' to reference the AI-generated Leslie character portrait image

Create detail page component for Obsession Scream haunted house following the pattern of existing house pages (e.g., OpenIceTombPage.tsx, WaxWorksPage.tsx), displaying extreme horror warning alert, Leslie character image from generatedImages at frontend/public/assets/generated/leslie-obsession-scream.dim_800x1000.png, house description highlighting Leslie's terrifying presence and long purple hair, tagline, and button to navigate to guest rules page with house parameter 'obsession-scream'
Add route for Obsession Scream detail page at path '/haunted-house/obsession-scream' following the pattern of other haunted house routes

Ensure Obsession Scream card navigation uses slugified name 'obsession-scream' to route to the detail page at '/haunted-house/obsession-scream', and displays the Leslie character image from generatedImages

Add guest rules entry for Obsession Scream with key 'obsession-scream', including safety rules about psychological horror intensity, behavior rules about respecting boundaries with Leslie character encounters, and health warnings about strobe lights and confined spaces typical of obsession-themed horror

requirements.summary: Wire AI-generated Leslie character image (terrifying teen with long purple hair) for display on Obsession Scream haunted house card and detail page
acceptanceCriteria: AI-generated image of Leslie (teen, long purple hair, terrifying) is created and stored in frontend/public/assets/generated/
Image is referenced in generatedImages.ts under haunted houses category
Image displays on Obsession Scream haunted house card and detail page
Image conveys horror atmosphere appropriate for the character

file_operations.description: Verify 'obsession-scream' entry in hauntedHouses category correctly maps to 'frontend/public/assets/generated/leslie-obsession-scream.dim_800x1000.png' for the AI-generated Leslie character portrait showing a terrifying teen with long purple hair in horror atmosphere (this entry is already added in REQ-5)
